'''Zeven Mallat''' was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agent still serving the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. In that year, he responded to a request from [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Cinzero Gann|Gann]] of [[Sector 5/Legends|Sector 5]] for information on the [[Yevetha]] by forwarding a report assembled by [[Obo Rin]], author of the ''[[Catalog of Intelligent Life in the Galaxy]]''. It is not entirely clear if Mallat contacted the famous [[sentientologist]] directly, or if he simply adapted archived information authored by him.
